# PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion

**Enumeration**

Options for requesting a video asset with or without adjustments, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/version] property.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion
```

## Constants

- **PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion.current**: Request the most recent version of the video asset, reflecting all edits.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion.original**: Request a version of the video asset without adjustments.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Specifying Video Request Options

- **version**: The version of the video to request.
- **deliveryMode**: A mode specifying the requested video quality and delivery priority.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode**: Options for delivering requested video data, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
